title: Decision Flowchart for Parsimonious Seasonal Models
description: A step-by-step guide for selecting the most appropriate parsimonious model based on the characteristics of a seasonal time series.
relationships: Starts with Seasonal Time Series Data, flows to ACF/PACF Analysis to identify patterns, then branches based on analysis results to candidate models (Multiplicative, Additive, Airline), each candidate flows to Parsimony Check which compares model fit vs. complexity, finally leading to the Selected Model
